description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-pagination` (T2-39). 3/6 libraries.

Review `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-pagination/`.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, current-page/total-pages/page-size typing, hx-page-change event detail typing
2. Accessibility — `<nav aria-label="Pagination">`, current page button has `aria-current="page"`, prev/next disabled state communicated (`aria-disabled` or `disabled`), ellipsis is presentational, keyboard nav through page buttons, axe-core pass
3. Tests — page selection, prev/next navigation, first/last page boundary, ellipsis display logic, page size change
4. Storybook — various total pages, current page states, with page size selector
5. CSS — active page styling, `--hx-*` tokens, CSS parts (prev, next, page, ellipsis)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable, GET parameter compatible

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-pagination/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-pagination — T2-39 antagonistic quality review
